description: Perform data cleaning and diagnostic accuracy analysis on the Pima Indians Diabetes dataset (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\diabetes.csv) using Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis. Clean the dataset by handling biologically implausible zero values in 'Glucose' and 'BMI' (set to Missing) and export the cleaned data to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\diabetes_clean.csv. Conduct ROC curve analyses for 'Glucose' and 'BMI' predicting 'Outcome', saving the final analysis output to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\EpiData\roc_results.html.
